title: Personal Driver (6 days / Boon Keng)
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Provide safe, reliable, and punctual transportation for the Director to various destinations, including meetings, events, airports, and personal or business-related engagements.
  • Ensure the Director’s comfort, privacy, and security at all times during travel.
  • Maintain a flexible schedule, with availability for early mornings, evenings, weekends, and urgent requests.
  • Plan and select the most efficient routes, considering traffic, weather, and other conditions.
  • Keep the assigned vehicle in pristine condition — clean, well-maintained, and serviced regularly.
  • Manage all vehicle-related tasks, such as fueling, cleaning, and arranging maintenance.
  • Exercise absolute discretion and confidentiality regarding any sensitive discussions or matters.
  • Coordinate closely with the Director’s schedule to ensure seamless, on-time transportation.
  • Provide exceptional service with a professional and positive attitude when interacting with the Director and other parties.

Requirements:

  • Valid Class 3/3A and vocational driving licence.
  • Excellent knowledge of Singapore’s roads and navigation tools.
  • Strong interpersonal skills for engaging with senior executives and high-profile individuals.
  • Proven time management skills and the ability to anticipate needs and challenges.
  • High level of discretion, confidentiality, and professionalism.
  • Physically able to drive for extended hours when required.
  • Flexible, dependable, and adaptable to last-minute schedule changes.
  • Capable of basic vehicle maintenance and care.
  • Well-groomed, with a professional appearance.
  • Prior experience as a personal driver or chauffeur is essential.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

Wecruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 20C0270

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
